message: Hi! How are you?
Good thanks for asking! How about yourself?
I'm doing pretty well. I'm excited to be moving to a new city soon!
Oh that's awesome! What city are you moving to?
I'm moving to Portland Oregon. I'm going to be pursuing my culinary dreams there.
That sounds amazing! I love Portland. I'm originally from there.
Really? That's so cool! Do you still live there?
No I moved away a few years ago. But I still visit my family there often.
That's great. Do you have any favorite places to visit in Portland?
Yes I love going to Powell's Books. It's the largest independent bookstore in the world.
Hey how are you doing?
Doing well how about yourself?
I'm doing great! I'm a fulltime student studying radiology at a local college and I also play in a band.
That's awesome! I'm a big fan of punk music and I like to run and do yoga.
Nice! I've been meaning to try yoga but I've never really had the time.
Hello there how are you doing today?
Hi there I am doing well thanks! How about you?
I'm doing well. What kind of things do you enjoy doing?
I enjoy reading cooking and spending time with my family.
Reading is a great way to relax. I love to cook too! What is your favorite meal to make?
I love making chicken parmesan and chocolate chip cookies.
Hi there!
Hey! How's your day?
Pretty good so far! Just got back from a hike.
Oh nice! Where did you hike?
I hiked in the Everglades. It was amazing! The wildlife was incredible!
